property.name: CarsComponent should mark the form as invalid if rental start and end dates are empty
property.value: CarsComponent Form validation should mark the form as invalid if rental start and end dates are empty

property.name: CarsComponent should mark the form as valid if rental start and end dates are provided
property.value: CarsComponent Form validation should mark the form as valid if rental start and end dates are provided

property.name: CategoryComponent should mark the form as invalid if required fields are empty
property.value: CategoryComponent Form validation should mark the form as invalid if required fields are empty

property.name: CategoryComponent should mark the form as valid if all required fields are filled
property.value: CategoryComponent Form validation should mark the form as valid if all required fields are filled

property.name: GetBookingsComponent should mark the form as invalid if required fields are empty
property.value: GetBookingsComponent Form validation should mark the form as invalid if required fields are empty

property.name: GetBookingsComponent should mark the form as valid if all required fields are filled
property.value: GetBookingsComponent Form validation should mark the form as valid if all required fields are filled

property.name: LoginComponent should have invalid form if username and password are empty
property.value: LoginComponent Form validation should have invalid form if username and password are empty

property.name: LoginComponent should have invalid form if username or password is empty
property.value: LoginComponent Form validation should have invalid form if username or password is empty

property.name: LoginComponent should have valid form if username and password are provided
property.value: LoginComponent Form validation should have valid form if username and password are provided

property.name: RegistrationComponent should have invalid form if any field is empty
property.value: RegistrationComponent Form validation should have invalid form if any field is empty

property.name: RegistrationComponent should have invalid form if email is invalid
property.value: RegistrationComponent Form validation should have invalid form if email is invalid

property.name: RegistrationComponent should have valid form if all fields are filled correctly
property.value: RegistrationComponent Form validation should have valid form if all fields are filled correctly

property.name: HttpService should retrieve all categories
property.value: HttpService #getAllCategories should retrieve all categories via GET with Authorization header

property.name: HttpService should retrieve bookings by agent
property.value: HttpService #getBookingByAgent should retrieve bookings via GET with Authorization header

property.name: HttpService should retrieve payment report
property.value: HttpService #paymentReport should retrieve payment report via GET with Authorization header

property.name: HttpService should retrieve booking report
property.value: HttpService #getBookingReport should retrieve booking report via GET with Authorization header

property.name: HttpService should retrieve all available cars
property.value: HttpService #getCars should retrieve all available cars via GET with Authorization header

property.name: HttpService should book a car
property.value: HttpService #bookACar should book a car via POST with request body and Authorization header

property.name: HttpService should process booking payment
property.value: HttpService #bookingPayment should process booking payment via POST with Authorization header

property.name: HttpService should update booking status
property.value: HttpService #updateBookingStatus should update booking status via PUT with Authorization header

property.name: HttpService should update a car
property.value: HttpService #updateCar should update car via PUT with Authorization header

property.name: HttpService should create a car
property.value: HttpService #createCar should create car via POST with Authorization header

property.name: HttpService should create a category
property.value: HttpService #createCategory should create category via POST with Authorization header

property.name: HttpService should update a category
property.value: HttpService #updateCategory should update category via PUT with Authorization header

property.name: HttpService should login
property.value: HttpService #Login should authenticate user via POST and return token

property.name: HttpService should register a user
property.value: HttpService #registerUser should register a user via POST

property.name: testRegisterUser
property.value: Backend should register user and persist user details successfully

property.name: testLoginUser
property.value: Backend should login user and return authentication token

property.name: testLoginWithWrongUsernameOrPassword
property.value: Backend should return unauthorized for invalid login credentials

property.name: testCreateCarCategory
property.value: Backend Admin API should create car category successfully

property.name: testGetAllCarCategories
property.value: Backend Admin API should retrieve all car categories

property.name: testUpdateCarCategory
property.value: Backend Admin API should update car category successfully

property.name: testGetAllBookings
property.value: Backend Admin API should retrieve all bookings report

property.name: testGetAllPayments
property.value: Backend Admin API should retrieve all payments report

property.name: testAddCar
property.value: Backend Agent API should add a car successfully

property.name: testUpdateCar
property.value: Backend Agent API should update car details successfully

property.name: testUpdateBookingStatus
property.value: Backend Agent API should update booking status successfully

property.name: testCreatePayment
property.value: Backend Agent API should create payment successfully

property.name: testGetAvailableCars
property.value: Backend Customer API should retrieve available cars

property.name: testBookCar
property.value: Backend Customer API should book a car successfully

property.name: testAdministratorApiShouldBeForbiddenForOtherUser
property.value: Backend should restrict administrator APIs for unauthorized roles

property.name: testAgentApiShouldBeForbiddenForOtherUser
property.value: Backend should restrict agent APIs for unauthorized roles

property.name: testCustomerApiShouldBeForbiddenForOtherUser
property.value: Backend should restrict customer APIs for unauthorized roles
